name: Easy Milky Way Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the lemon juice to the pie filling.
2. Place the mixture in the prepared pie shell.
3. Thinly slice the candy bars over top.
4. Sprinkle with chopped nuts.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 450°F for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce temperature to 350°F and continue baking for an additional 10 to 15 minutes.
7. Cool and serve.
